name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-6
title: resolve-scope.py emits misleading error when not in a git repo and RABBIT_ROOT unset
description: In resolve-scope.py (lines 20-28), if RABBIT_ROOT env var is unset and 'git rev-parse --show-toplevel' fails (script invoked outside a git repo), repo_root is set to empty string. Then on line 30, find_feature becomes '/.claude/features/contract/scripts/find-feature.py' (rooted at filesystem root). The user gets 'ERROR: find-feature.py not found: /.claude/features/...' which doesn't indicate the real cause (no repo root). Should detect empty repo_root explicitly and emit a clear error.

history.note: Wave 4 fix; verified by test/test-bug-fixes-wave4.py and test-resolve-scope.py
